thig6.3:1.2: I, a young man, full of youth.
thig6.3:1.4:
Come, Khemā, let’s enjoy ourselves to the music of a five-piece band.”
Khemā:
thig6.3:2.1: “I’m disgusted, ashamed of this putrid body—
thig6.3:3.1: Sensual pleasures are like swords & spears;
thig6.3:4.4: that you have been, End-maker, struck down.” * * *
thig6.3:5.1: Paying homage to the zodiac stars,
thig6.3:5.2: tending the fire in the forest,
thig6.3:5.3: not knowing it as it actually was,
thig6.3:5.4: fools, you conceived it as purity.
thig6.3:6.1: Whereas I am one who pays homage
thig6.3:6.2: to the One Self-awakened, the utmost man.
thig6.3:6.4: I’m one who has done the Teacher’s bidding, entirely released from sufferings & stress.
